scope: MiMo V2.5 JANG_2L SimpleEngine non-MLLM text prompt rendering
bug_class: MiMo native tokenizer renders enable_thinking=false as a closed <think></think> assistant rail; current failure artifacts show this prompt shape can first-token-stop or produce empty visible output on long/cache/tool rows.
fix: When SimpleEngine is using the non-MLLM text path for family mimo_v2 and the API request asks enable_thinking=false, render the chat template with enable_thinking=true so the native template emits the plain assistant prefix. The API-level thinking-off contract remains requested_enable_thinking=false; only the prompt render kwarg changes for MiMo.
release_boundary: This is not live MiMo clearance. Long-prompt coherence, tool protocol, source-vs-quant classification, speed, cache/L2, and VL/audio/video remain open.
